content:
The Labyrinth (Greek Mythology)
Must complete a logic-based challenge to escape.


📜 The Resurrection Conditions
✔ A player may attempt a Resurrection Challenge once per week.
✔ Some archetypes may attempt a rescue mission (e.g., the Mentor may guide someone back).
✔ If a player fails their Resurrection Challenge three times, they remain in exile permanently.

✅ Why This Works:
• Gives players a way back into the game after a disastrous run.
• Ties into literary exile themes—characters who are banished must prove themselves to return.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 298 (chunk 298/555)
